title: Gurren Lagann Style 'Gaina-Dachi' Anime Stance Prompt
description: A detailed prompt designed to generate an explosive, high-impact anime illustration in the style of Gurren Lagann (Gaina-Dachi stance). It focuses on intense emotion, dynamic upward wind effects, bold linework, and includes a specific large, handwritten Japanese brush text overlay.
content:
Consistent character from reference image: exact same face, hairstyle, body shape, and original outfit. NO redesign.

[Composition & Pose]:
Heroic and exaggerated anime stance, waist-up framing, front-facing. Arms tightly crossed, chest pushed forward, leaning slightly towards the camera to create intense pressure. High visual density.

[Expression]:
Explosive emotion, intense anger mixed with determination. Mouth wide open shouting, eyebrows sharply angled, piercing eyes with sharp highlights.

[Dynamic Motion]:
A violent upward wind blasting from below the character,
powerful vertical airflow pushing both fabric and hair upward and outward.
The original clothing from the reference image remains intact and reacts naturally to the force,
all loose parts of the outfit whipping and flaring aggressively,
the character’s hair is lifted, blown upward, and spread by the same updraft,
hair strands follow the vertical flow with dynamic, forceful motion,
movement extends beyond the frame,
the motion feels heavy, chaotic, and explosive,
as if the character is standing in a violent upward draft.

[Art Style]:
Bold anime illustration, thick and rough energetic linework, expressive hand-drawn strokes. High contrast, dramatic cel-shading. Focus on raw emotion and impact.

[Background & Text]:
Solid white background.
Behind the character, ONE single instance of large handwritten Japanese brush text.
The text must appear ONCE only, not repeated, not duplicated.
All characters must be fully visible, complete, and readable.
No missing strokes, no cropped characters, no broken parts.

The text is continuous and written as one complete phrase:
「{argument name="セリフ" default="俺を誰だと思っていやがる！"}」

Pure hand-painted brush lettering, NOT a font.
Wild, uneven brush strokes with controlled ink splatter and wobble,
but the structure of each character remains intact. Black ink only.

[Technical]:
High-impact poster visual, anime key visual style, ultra-high resolution, 8k.

Subject: Person in the image

Create a 3:4 hyper-realistic candid night-time event photo in an unedited iPhone rear-camera flash look. Shot handheld at chest-to-face height, close to the Subject, with a wide-angle feel (≈24–26mm equivalent), slight edge distortion, and deep depth-of-field keeping the Subject, nearby crowd, and racetrack background readable.

Vertical medium-close framing from waist to slightly above the head. The Subject stands near a railing at a racing circuit, body angled slightly sideways, one arm bent casually near the railing, the other relaxed. The Subject’s expression is alert and slightly distracted, mouth gently parted, gaze directed off-frame as if reacting to live action nearby. The moment feels mid-event and unposed.

The Subject wears a white-and-dark racing-style jacket with visible motorsport branding and patches over a fitted inner top, showing structured fabric, subtle sheen, and natural folds. A thin necklace catches small flash highlights at the collarbone, with jeans and a belt visible at the waist.

The environment is a crowded night racing circuit with railings, spectators, sponsor signage, LED screens, lighting rigs, and structural beams. The background feels busy, noisy, and energetic, adding visual clutter and motion.

The image should feel like a spontaneous iPhone flash photo taken during a live racing event—chaotic, energetic, and human. No cinematic lighting, no editorial posing, no beauty retouching.

description: An intense, highly restrictive prompt designed to create a surreal, cinematic photograph of a subject floating weightlessly high above a cloud layer. It emphasizes strict identity preservation from an uploaded photo, ultra-realistic natural lighting, high altitude setting with storm clouds, and spec
content: TASK: Use the subject from the uploaded photo as the exact person in the final image.  SUBJECT RULES (STRICT): - Use the uploaded photo as the sole reference for the person. - Preserve the subject’s identity, facial features, body proportions, hairstyle, clothing, and overall likeness. - Do NOT change the subject’s face, age, gender, or identity. - Do NOT stylize the subject into a cartoon or illustration. - The subject must remain fully photorealistic.  SCENE & COMPOSITION: Create a surreal, cinematic photograph of the subject suspended in mid-air, floating as if gently falling, frozen in perfect stillness high above the Earth. The subject’s body appears weightless with a natural falling posture. Clothing and loose elements subtly ripple in the wind.  ENVIRONMENT: - High-altitude sky scene above the cloud layer. - Overcast yet luminous sky with towering storm clouds breaking apart. - Soft, realistic sunlight rays piercing through gaps in the clouds. - Natural volumetric light beams and atmospheric depth. - Subtle cloud vapor and mist drifting around the subject. - A distant commercial passenger airplane appears in the background, small in scale, flying horizontally through the clouds. - The airplane must remain far behind the subject and never overlap or distract from them. - A few birds are also present at varying distances, closer than the airplane, with slight motion blur to reinforce depth and scale.  LIGHTING & COLOR: - Ultra-realistic natural lighting. - Cool blues and soft whites dominate the palette. - Warm golden highlights from sunlight striking cloud edges and parts of the subject. - High dynamic range with realistic contrast.  CAMERA & REALISM: - Cinematic photography style. - Realistic depth of field (no artificial or extreme blur). - Correct perspective and scale consistent with high altitude aviation. - No fantasy lighting, no glowing outlines, no surreal distortions beyond the floating effect.  MOOD & STYLE: - Dramatic yet calm. - Minimalist composition. - Strong sense of altitude, silence, and suspension. - Hyper-realistic weather, clouds, and atmospheric detail. - Looks like a high-end cinematic still, not digital art.  HARD RULES: - Do NOT change the subject’s identity or pose beyond floating. - Do NOT add text, logos, UI, or watermarks. - Do NOT introduce sci-fi or fantasy elements. - Keep everything physically believable and grounded in realism.

title: Minimalist Flowchart/Diagram Generation Style Guide
description: A detailed style guide prompt for Nano Banana Pro to generate minimalist, clean flowcharts or diagrams. It specifies color palette, line types (orthogonal), shapes (rounded rectangles, diamonds), and typography to ensure a professional, consistent, and easily readable infographic style.
content:
生成图片，1. 风格核心参数提取 (Style Guide)
请参照以下参数：
配色 (Color Palette):
背景: 纯白 (#FFFFFF)
线条/边框: 深灰或纯黑 (#333333 或 #000000)
文字: 深灰 (#333333)，字重常规，无加粗。
填充: 无填充（透明）或纯白填充，以遮挡背后的线条。
线条 (Lines/Connectors):
类型: 正交线 (Orthogonal/Elbow)，即只有垂直和水平线，拐角为直角。
粗细: 极细 (1px)。
箭头: 实心小三角 (Solid Arrowhead)，黑色。
形状 (Shapes):
普通节点: 圆角矩形 (Rounded Rectangle)，圆角半径很小 (约 4px - 8px)。
判断节点: 菱形 (Diamond)。
开始/结束: 胶囊形或圆角更大的矩形。
排版 (Typography):
对齐: 居中对齐。
字体: 无衬线字体 (Sans-serif)，如 Arial, Roboto 或思源黑体。字号较小 (约 12px-14px)。

上面的风格加上你的用户旅程/流程给到gemini，那么他就会呈现相应的效果给你，调都不用调

You are performing intelligent aspect ratio transformation with compositional awareness.

CONTEXT:
The source image exists within a specific dimensional space. Your task is to translate it into a new aspect ratio while preserving semantic integrity and visual coherence.

ANALYSIS PHASE:
- Identify the primary subject anchor point and secondary visual elements
- Map the compositional weight distribution across quadrants
- Detect edge dependencies (elements that rely on frame boundaries)
- Assess negative space utilization and breathing room requirements

TRANSFORMATION LOGIC:
- Calculate optimal subject placement using rule-of-thirds grid alignment for target ratio
- Determine extension vectors based on background continuity patterns
- Evaluate whether horizontal or vertical expansion better serves the composition
- Apply content-aware fill logic for generated regions while maintaining tonal consistency

PRESERVATION RULES:
- Typographic elements: maintain exact pixel fidelity, no scaling or repositioning unless required by new boundaries
- Brand marks and logos: preserve aspect ratio and relative positioning
- Facial features: no modification, distortion, or regeneration
- Fine details: texture patterns must flow naturally into extended regions

OUTPUT PARAMETERS:
- Seamless integration between original and generated content
- No detectable boundaries, halos, or color shifting at transition zones
- Lighting direction consistency across the full canvas
- The result must appear as if originally captured or designed at the target ratio

QUALITY THRESHOLD:
Production-ready output suitable for commercial use, print media, and high-resolution display contexts.

title: Hyper-Realistic Monster Energy Product Shot with Neon Flames
description: An extremely detailed, technical prompt for generating a hyper-realistic product photo of a Monster Energy can. It focuses on minute details like micro-condensation, metallic reflections, and the physics of neon-green flames erupting from below, all rendered with specific camera and lighting specifi
content:
Hyper-realistic 4K product photo of a Monster Energy can, logo centered and perfectly sharp, the can suspended in mid-air with no visible support. 

The can's surface is cold and tactile: dense micro-condensation (droplets 0.1-1.2 mm) with natural gravity streaks, crisp specular glints, subtle lacquer micro-scratches and brushed metallic reflections visible along the curvature. Black body paint reads deep and velvety, the green 'M' claw mark remains vivid and undistorted. From the bottom edge of the frame, vivid neon-green flames erupt upward, frozen mid-motion, licking around the can without touching or consuming it. Flames are hyper-detailed: semi-transparent feathered edges, emissive cores, laminar-to-turbulent transitions, filamentary curls, Kelvin-Helmholtz ripples, wispy tongues and vortex roll-ups. Fine incandescent sparks and nano-embers hang in the air, some caught as sharp pinpoints, others rendered as faint bokeh glints. Tiny heat-distortion ripples subtly bend the background near the flame edges (very restrained). Behind the scene, blurred and veiled in haze, a vague silhouette of a roaring beast's head glows faintly inside green smoke a suggestive contour only, semi-obscured by fog, adding mythic presence without distracting from the can. Cinematic low-angle close-up composition, vertical 3:4. Generous negative space at the bottom emphasizes the upward eruption. Full-frame 100 mm macro prime, f/8 for deep micro-texture, 1/200 s, ISO 100. Critical focus plane on the Monster logo, condensation droplets on the front cylinder, and the nearest flame filaments; background falls smoothly into creamy bokeh. Lighting: dual-rim system with high contrast. Camera-left: intense neon-green backlight (~520 nm) skimming the flames, amplifying translucency and emissive cores. Camera-right: cool blue-white rim (~6500 K) defining the can's cylindrical edges and revealing micro-condensation sparkle. A very subtle frontal fill (5-8%) preserves logo readability without flattening blacks. Black flags and negative fill maintain deep shadows; no spill on the background. Atmosphere: thin volumetric smoke and low-density haze rise from below, catching rim beams to create delicate light shafts. Sparse drifting particles read as 'air texture' around the flames.
